metadata.description: AI Coding plugins for GitHub Copilot, Claude Code.

plugins.name: ai-pr-reviewer
plugins.description: AI-powered Azure DevOps pull request reviewer that provides suggestions, guidance, and annotated feedback for PRs.

plugins.name: banana2
plugins.description: A formalized tool for generating hyper-realistic, highly-controlled images using the Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash) model through parameterized JSON prompting.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

plugins.name: ui-ux-pro-max
plugins.description: Professional UI/UX design intelligence for AI coding assistants. Includes searchable databases of styles, colors, typography, charts, and UX guidelines for React, Next.js, Astro, Vue, Nuxt.js, Nuxt UI, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, and Jetpack Compose.
